 60â†’@Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
 61â†’fun handlePostListAction(
 62â†’    activity: FragmentActivity,
 63â†’    action: PostListAction,
 64â†’    remotePreviewLogicHelper: RemotePreviewLogicHelper,
 65â†’    previewStateHelper: PreviewStateHelper,
 66â†’    mediaPickerLauncher: MediaPickerLauncher,
 67â†’    blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 68â†’) {
 69â†’    when (action) {
 70â†’        is PostListAction.EditPost -> {
 71â†’            ActivityLauncher.editPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.loadAutoSaveRevision)
 72â†’        }
 73â†’        is PostListAction.NewPost -> {
 74â†’            ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(activity, action.site, action.isPromo, POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST, -1, null)
 75â†’        }
 76â†’        is PostListAction.NewStoryPost -> {
 77â†’            if (AppPrefs.shouldShowStoriesIntro()) {
 78â†’                StoriesIntroDialogFragment.newInstance(action.site)
 79â†’                    .show(activity.supportFragmentManager, StoriesIntroDialogFragment.TAG)
 80â†’            } else {
 81â†’                mediaPickerLauncher.showStoriesPhotoPickerForResultAndTrack(activity, action.site)
 82â†’            }
 83â†’        }
 84â†’        is PostListAction.PreviewPost -> {
 85â†’            val helperFunctions = previewStateHelper.getUploadStrategyFunctions(activity, action)
 86â†’            remotePreviewLogicHelper.runPostPreviewLogic(
 87â†’                activity = activity,
 88â†’                site = action.site,
 89â†’                post = action.post,
 90â†’                helperFunctions = helperFunctions
 91â†’            )
 92â†’        }
 93â†’        is PostListAction.RemotePreviewPost -> {
 94â†’            ActivityLauncher.previewPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.remotePreviewType)
 95â†’        }
 96â†’        is PostListAction.RetryUpload -> {
 97â†’            // restart the UploadService with retry parameters
 98â†’            val intent = UploadService.getRetryUploadServiceIntent(
 99â†’                activity,
100â†’                action.post,
101â†’                action.trackAnalytics
102â†’            )
103â†’            activity.startService(intent)
104â†’        }
105â†’        is PostListAction.ViewStats -> {
106â†’            ActivityLauncher.viewStatsSinglePostDetails(activity, action.site, action.post)
107â†’        }
108â†’        is PostListAction.ViewPost -> {
109â†’            ActivityLauncher.browsePostOrPage(activity, action.site, action.post)
110â†’        }
111â†’        is PostListAction.DismissPendingNotification -> {
112â†’            NativeNotificationsUtils.dismissNotification(action.pushId, activity)
113â†’        }
114â†’        is PostListAction.ShowPromoteWithBlaze -> {
115â†’            blazeFeatureUtils.trackEntryPointTapped(BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
116â†’            ActivityLauncher.openPromoteWithBlaze(activity, action.post, BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
117â†’        }
118â†’        is PostListAction.CopyUrl -> {
119â†’            try {
120â†’                activity.clipboardManager?.setPrimaryClip(
121â†’                    ClipData.newPlainText("${action.post.id}", action.post.link)
122â†’                ) ?: throw NullPointerException("ClipboardManager is not supported on this device")
123â†’
124â†’                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageSuccess)
125â†’            } catch (e: Exception) {
126â†’                /**
127â†’                 * Ignore any exceptions here as certain devices have bugs and will fail.
128â†’                 * See https://crrev.com/542cb9cfcc927295615809b0c99917b09a219d9f for more info.
129â†’                 */
130â†’                AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, e)
131â†’                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageError)
132â†’            }
133â†’        }
134â†’    }
135â†’}

222â†’    private fun getTitle(post: PostModel): UiString {
223â†’        return if (post.title.isNotBlank()) {
224â†’            UiStringText(StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(post.title).let { HtmlUtils.stripHtml(it) })

229â†’        PostUtils.getPostListExcerptFromPost(post)
230â†’            .takeIf { !it.isNullOrBlank() }
231â†’            ?.let { StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(it) }
232â†’            ?.let { PostUtils.collapseShortcodes(it) }
233â†’            ?.let { UiStringText(getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(it)) }
234â†’    private fun getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(input: String): String {
235â†’        val parts = input.split(Regex("\\s+\\n+"))
236â†’        return parts.first()

254â†’    private fun shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {

279â†’            uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection -> {

395â†’    private fun createButtonTypes(
396â†’        postStatus: PostStatus,
397â†’        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
398â†’        isLocallyChanged: Boolean,
399â†’        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
400â†’        siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
401â†’        statsSupported: Boolean,
402â†’        shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase: Boolean,
403â†’        shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze: Boolean
404â†’    ): List<PostListButtonType> {
405â†’        val canRetryUpload = uploadUiState is UploadFailed
406â†’        val canCancelPendingAutoUpload = (uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection ||
407â†’                (uploadUiState is UploadFailed && uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload))
408â†’        val canPublishPost = (canRetryUpload || uploadUiState is NothingToUpload || !canCancelPendingAutoUpload) &&
409â†’                (isLocallyChanged || isLocalDraft || postStatus == DRAFT ||
410â†’                        (siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish && postStatus == PENDING))
411â†’
412â†’        val canShowStats = statsSupported &&
413â†’                postStatus == PUBLISHED &&
414â†’                !isLocalDraft &&
415â†’                !isLocallyChanged &&
416â†’                shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase
417â†’        val canShowCopy = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == DRAFT
418â†’        val canShowCopyUrlButton = !isLocalDraft && postStatus != TRASHED
419â†’        val canShowViewButton = !canRetryUpload && postStatus != TRASHED
420â†’        val canShowPublishButton = canRetryUpload || canPublishPost
421â†’        val buttonTypes = ArrayList<PostListButtonType>()
422â†’
423â†’        if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload) {
424â†’            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD)
425â†’        }
426â†’
427â†’        if (canShowPublishButton) {
428â†’            buttonTypes.add(
429â†’                when {
430â†’                    canRetryUpload -> BUTTON_RETRY
431â†’                    !siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish -> BUTTON_SUBMIT
432â†’                    postStatus == SCHEDULED && isLocallyChanged -> BUTTON_SYNC
433â†’                    else -> BUTTON_PUBLISH
434â†’                }
435â†’            )
436â†’        }
437â†’
438â†’        if (canShowViewButton) {
439â†’            buttonTypes.addViewOrPreviewAction(isLocalDraft || isLocallyChanged)
440â†’        }
441â†’
442â†’        if (canShowStats) {
443â†’            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_STATS)
444â†’        }
445â†’
446â†’        if (canShowCopy) {
447â†’            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY)
448â†’        }
449â†’
450â†’        buttonTypes.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus)
451â†’
452â†’        if (canShowCopyUrlButton) {
453â†’            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY_URL)
454â†’        }
455â†’
456â†’        if (shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze) {
457â†’            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE)
458â†’        }
459â†’
460â†’        buttonTypes.addDeletingOrTrashAction(isLocalDraft, postStatus)
461â†’
462â†’        return sortPostListButtons(buttonTypes)
463â†’    }

 60â†’@Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
 61â†’fun handlePostListAction(
 62â†’    activity: FragmentActivity,
 63â†’    action: PostListAction,
 64â†’    remotePreviewLogicHelper: RemotePreviewLogicHelper,
 65â†’    previewStateHelper: PreviewStateHelper,
 66â†’    mediaPickerLauncher: MediaPickerLauncher,
 67â†’    blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 68â†’) {
 69â†’    when (action) {
 70â†’        is PostListAction.EditPost -> {
 71â†’            ActivityLauncher.editPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.loadAutoSaveRevision)
 72â†’        }
 73â†’        is PostListAction.NewPost -> {
 74â†’            ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(activity, action.site, action.isPromo, POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST, -1, null)
 75â†’        }
 76â†’        is PostListAction.NewStoryPost -> {
 77â†’            if (AppPrefs.shouldShowStoriesIntro()) {
 78â†’                StoriesIntroDialogFragment.newInstance(action.site)
 79â†’                    .show(activity.supportFragmentManager, StoriesIntroDialogFragment.TAG)
 80â†’            } else {
 81â†’                mediaPickerLauncher.showStoriesPhotoPickerForResultAndTrack(activity, action.site)
 82â†’            }
 83â†’        }
 84â†’        is PostListAction.PreviewPost -> {
 85â†’            val helperFunctions = previewStateHelper.getUploadStrategyFunctions(activity, action)
 86â†’            remotePreviewLogicHelper.runPostPreviewLogic(
 87â†’                activity = activity,
 88â†’                site = action.site,
 89â†’                post = action.post,
 90â†’                helperFunctions = helperFunctions
 91â†’            )
 92â†’        }
 93â†’        is PostListAction.RemotePreviewPost -> {
 94â†’            ActivityLauncher.previewPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.remotePreviewType)
 95â†’        }
 96â†’        is PostListAction.RetryUpload -> {
 97â†’            // restart the UploadService with retry parameters
 98â†’            val intent = UploadService.getRetryUploadServiceIntent(
